title: Australian-Style Grilled Corn with Bush Tomatoes
description: A simple and flavorful recipe featuring grilled corn and bush tomatoes, originating from rural Australia. Perfect for a gluten-free dinner option.
instructions: Brush corn with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill corn for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until lightly charred.
Meanwhile, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add diced bush tomatoes and cook for 2-3 minutes, until tender.
Stir in lemon juice and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve grilled corn with the bush tomato mixture spooned over the top.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
